name: WazuhIsolateHost
author: ATTENSE
description: Isolate a compromised host from the network using Wazuh's built-in route-null active response (null-routes the host).

configurationItems.name: wazuh_url
configurationItems.description: Base URL of the Wazuh manager API

configurationItems.name: agent_name
configurationItems.description: Wazuh-registered agent name to fall back to when the observable IP does not match a known agent's reporting address
